purpose: Python router pipeline — THE top-of-funnel for all prompts. Owns interview + plan + decompose + route as one engine. Lucid shells out to `python -m neumann.router.cli` for mission routing. PR #48 (2026-05-03) shipped the Decomposer-before-Planner ordering.
pipeline_ordering: Prompt → ShapeClassifier (advisory) → Interviewer (opt-in) → ConfirmedIntent → Decomposer (intent → N sub-intents) → Planner (1+ tasks per sub-intent) → TaskDecomposer (task-level split for oversized) → per-task routing (TaskClassifier → ContextResolver → PersonaSelector → fallback → validate) → RoutingTrace[] → Fusion Todo column

subcommands.name: task
subcommands.purpose: Route a single-task prompt (forced SINGLE_TASK path, optionally with interview); outputs PersonaDecision for 1 task

subcommands.name: mission
subcommands.purpose: Full pipeline: shape → interview → decompose → plan → route; outputs Plan + PersonaDecisions for all tasks

subcommands.name: classify-shape
subcommands.purpose: Advisory shape classification only; outputs ShapeDecision

core_types.TaskType: enum 14 values (VERIFICATION, SECURITY, TECH_ARCHITECTURE, STRATEGY, FINANCE, MARKETING, FRONTEND, BACKEND, FULLSTACK, PERFORMANCE, DOCUMENTATION, BUGFIX, IMPLEMENTATION, UNKNOWN)
core_types.PlannedTask: frozen dataclass: title, description, type_hints, target_files, acceptance_criteria, depends_on, extra:dict
core_types.ConfirmedIntent: frozen dataclass: raw_prompt, confirmed_intent (human-approved restatement), target_repo (owner/name), success_criteria, constraints, out_of_scope, human_approver_id, human_approved, transcript:InterviewExchange[]
core_types.Plan: frozen dataclass: mission_title, summary, assumptions, tasks:PlannedTask[], confirmed_intent
core_types.RoutingContext: frozen dataclass: project_type, available_personas, persona_load, column (Fusion lifecycle), extra
core_types.ShapeDecision: frozen dataclass: shape, matched_rule_priority, matched_rule_note, sentence_count
core_types.PersonaDecision: frozen dataclass: persona, task_type, matched_rule_priority, dispatch_priority, fallback_used, trace
core_types.RoutingTrace: frozen dataclass: input_hash, shape_decision, task, context, persona_decision, duration_ms

modules.purpose: Orchestrates full intake pipeline (shape → interview → decompose → plan → route)
fnr CLI entry point with argparse subcommands
Core domain model (10+ dataclasses); pure data
Regex-based SINGLE_TASK vs MISSION classification
Interviewer protocol + Mock/CLI/Chat/Slack/Lucid/Web implementations + validate_intent() deterministic gate
Intent-level decomposer: split oversized ConfirmedIntent into N sub-intents BEFORE Planner
Task-level decomposer (FN-002): split oversized PlannedTask AFTER Planner
Planner protocol + MockPlanner
Regex-based PlannedTask → TaskType classification
Derive RoutingContext from env + file-heuristics (frontend/backend/test extension matchers)
Dispatch-table lookup (task_type + context → persona); honors available_personas filter + FALLBACK_SENTINEL
Post-decision validation
Resolve FALLBACK_SENTINEL → real persona at runtime
Load Fusion 9 preset personas + custom JSON definitions
Phase 2: run one QA Test attempt against worktree; parse reviewer verdict
Parse ## QA Test block from PROMPT.md
WatcherState persistent retry-count tracking (idempotent)
RetryPolicy: decide retry vs escalate based on verdict + attempt count
External QA gate daemon: polls Fusion In Review, executes QA, dispatches verdicts (PASS|FAIL|SKIP|PLANNER_BUG)
invocation() context manager → JSONL logger for harness invocations

flows.name: Full mission pipeline
steps: ShapeClassifier — advisory: single-task vs mission via regex rules
Interviewer (opt-in) — LLM clarification loop → ConfirmedIntent; validate_intent() deterministic gate (target_repo regex, success_criteria non-empty, human_approved=True)
Decomposer — if intent exceeds thresholds (max_lines_estimate=500, max_files_changed=3, max_distinct_outputs=2), split into N sub-intents + integration intent
Planner — runs ONCE PER SUB-INTENT; emits 1+ PlannedTasks each (LLM-backed or MockPlanner)
TaskDecomposer — post-Planner: split oversized PlannedTasks into N child tasks + integration task
Per-task routing: TaskClassifier → ContextResolver → PersonaSelector → fallback → validator
Output: PipelineResult with shape, confirmed_intent, plan, routes[]
flows.outcome: RoutingTrace[] ready to emit into Fusion Todo column

flows.name: Fast path (single-task, no interviewer)
steps: No interviewer wired → synthesize ConfirmedIntent from prompt
Skip decompose + plan; route raw prompt directly as PlannedTask
flows.outcome: Single PersonaDecision; preserved for tests and trivial prompts

flows.name: Phase 2 QA Watcher (FusionWatcher daemon)
flows.trigger: External cron polls Fusion's In Review column every 30s
steps: For each task: GET /api/tasks/{id} → PROMPT.md body
Dispatch: DONE+PASS → move to done silently. DONE+SKIP → done + breadcrumb. RETRY → comment + move back to in-progress. PAUSE_ESCALATE → comment + /pause + WhatsApp notify via clawdbot
flows.outcome: QA gate is independent of Coder; idempotent via WatcherState

qa_agent_phases.name: Task entry
qa_agent_phases.what: Planner embeds `## QA Test` section in PROMPT.md (schema: type, reviewer_tier, steps, expected_failures, pass_criterion, browser_tool). Parsed by parse_qa_test().

qa_agent_phases.name: Pre-merge watcher
qa_agent_phases.what: fusion_watcher.py polls In Review; QAExecutor runs reviewer (pi-claude-cli Opus 4.7); RetryPolicy decides dispose

qa_agent_phases.name: Post-deploy cron (coywolf-qa)
qa_agent_phases.what: Daemon monitors deployed agents in production; escalates regressions to Brendan

telemetry.shape: { ts, harness, invocation_id, outcome, latency_ms, input:{}, output:{}, error, skill_invocations:[{name, outcome, latency_ms}] }
telemetry.pattern: with invocation('neumann') as t: t.input(...); t.skill('shape_classifier', 'success', duration_ms); t.output(...)

invariants: Interviewer is opt-in (CLI/Slack/Lucid/web wire one; offline/tests leave None → skip interview)
Fast path preserved: SINGLE_TASK + no interviewer → bypass decompose/plan
Decompose BEFORE Planner (keeps Planner input small; Brendan's design)
Task-decompose AFTER Planner (catches oversized tasks Planner emits; FN-002)
Validation gate deterministic (no LLM; schema rules; max 8 rounds)
ConfirmedIntent approval explicit (human_approved=True before Planner runs)
QA watcher idempotent (WatcherState outside Fusion; survives restarts)
Personas extensible (registry loads presets + custom JSON at runtime)
FALLBACK_SENTINEL is a dispatch signal; fallback.py resolves at runtime
